title: coccoloba declinata
intro: Coccoloba declinata, also known as the 'Sea Grape' or 'Beach Grape', is a tropical plant species belonging to the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). The plant is rich in medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a natural diuretic and to lower blood pressure. Coccoloba declinata is also used for its health benefits, such as treating kidney stones, treating urinary tract infections, and aiding in the management of diabetes. The leaves and fruits of the plant can be used to prepare herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally for their medicinal and health benefits.
